data.name: Hentai Clicker: Cathy is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Cathy is streaming

Step into a world of cuteness and seduction where Cathy, your favorite pink-haired nekomimi , reacts to your every move. Click, flirt, and unlock her purrfect secrets one outfit at a time!

🍑 About the Game

Get ready for a juicy blend of ecchi clicker mechanics and catgirl / nekogirl charm. Each click brings you closer to Cathy’s intimate world—where she’s always ready to play. Collect hearts to unlock outfits, animations, and voice lines that evolve as your relationship deepens.

🎉 Features

  • 🎨 Gorgeous Anime Visuals – Sexy, vibrant art style that brings Cathy to life.

  • 🐾 Adorable Nekomimi – Pink hair, cat ears, and irresistible expressions.

  • 🖱️ Clicker Gameplay – Simple, satisfying and highly addictive.

  • 💗 Unlockable Outfits – From innocent pajamas to daring lingerie.

  • 🎤 Voice Acting & Dialogues – She reacts to your clicks with moans, purrs and teasing.

  • 🚀 Upgrades & Progression – Boost your heart collection and discover hidden scenes.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

Whether you're here for the hot catgirl energy, the lewd progression, or the anime aesthetics, Cathy the Catgirl delivers a highly replayable and spicy experience. She's not just a character—she’s your virtual obsession.

🎮 How to Play

  • 🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Each click brings you closer to Cathy’s next surprise.

  • 🔓 Unlock Scenes – Use hearts to reveal outfits, poses, and steamy secrets.

  • 💥 Upgrade Skills – Accelerate your progress and reach the climax faster.

🎉 Start Your Neko Adventure!

Ready to pet the kitty? 🐱
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Cathy is streaming now and make her purr in every way imaginable.

data.short_description: 🔞Step into a lewd adventure with Hentai Clicker: Cathy the Catgirl!🐾 Click to collect hearts, unlock sexy outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive clicker game. Enjoy gorgeous anime art, explicit content, and interactive voice acting with your favorite nekogirl!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 德文, 韓文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
